mnemonics: Judge AI Justly: Jung's Juggernaut of Justice Yields Only User-Needs Granted. (A mnemonic using the first letters of his name: J-Y-J)
keyPoints: Focuses on developing AI systems that prioritize human values, ethics, and well-being.
Emphasizes the importance of explainable AI (XAI) so users can understand and trust AI decisions.
Advocates for participatory design, involving diverse stakeholders in the AI development process.
commonMistakes: Confusing Human-Centred AI with simply making a user-friendly interface; it's a deeper ethical and value-based framework.
Overlooking the 'human-in-the-loop' necessity, assuming full automation is always the goal.
Focusing solely on technological performance metrics while neglecting societal impact and user trust.
